query: Planica Ski Marathon cross country ski race Planica Nordic Centre

videos.title: Cross-country skiing Planica Nordic Centre
videos.description: A Winter Fairy Tale - Trails with a total length of 40 km connecting Kranjska Gora, Rateče, Planica and Tamar. The idyllic trails are stretching between 800 and 1,100 metres above sea level.

videos.title: Ski To The Sun 2020
videos.description:
Short film of scenes of the Ski to the Sun Marathon and Relay race in the Methow Valley.  Sponsored by the Methow Trails and Methow Valley Nordic Ski Education Foundation.

Directed by Mike Tuggy

Videography:
Mike Tuggy - Aerial
Kathy Tuggy
Annette Frahm
Sally Kentch
Larry Mauksch

Music: Licensed from Artlist.io

www.telegraphixstudios.com

videos.title: Canadian Worldloppet: Gatienau Loppet
videos.description: In 2021 the Canadian Worldloppet event, the Gatineau Loppet, has to take place virtually. Register on the website, do your race at home and upload your gps-file to the result list.

videos.title: Cinematic FPV | Planica Ski Marathon 2025 in 4K
videos.description:
🏔️ Experience the thrill of the Planica Ski Marathon 2025 — from a whole new perspective.  
Captured entirely by FPV drone in stunning 4K, this aftermovie highlights the raw beauty and energy of one of Slovenia’s most iconic winter sporting events.

🎥 Shot on: GoPro Session 5
🎵 Music: Hannah Parrott – *Tilt* (Extended)  
📍 Location: Planica Nordic Centre, Slovenia  
🎬 Format: Cinematic FPV | Manual Mode


---

💬 What was your favorite moment? Drop a comment below!  
👍 Like this kind of cinematic FPV? Hit that like button and subscribe for more!
